𝗛𝗘𝗥𝗢𝗜𝗖𝗚𝗔𝗠𝗘𝗦𝗟𝗔𝗨𝗡𝗖𝗛𝗘𝗥 | To provide a unified and open-source game launcher for users to access and play games from various digital distribution platforms on their desktop operating systems.  🔥 Super Hot!

╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📘 TypeScript 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To provide a unified and open-source game launcher for users to access and play games from various digital distribution platforms on their desktop operating systems.
📅 Created: Dec 2020 • Updated: Mar 2026

╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Supports Epic Games Store, GOG, and Amazon Games.
✅ Cross-platform compatibility (Linux, Windows, macOS).
✅ Built with web technologies (TypeScript, React, Electron).
✅ Utilizes external tools like Legendary, gogdl, and Nile for game management.
✅ Open Source with community contributions.


╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ 11.1K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 583 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 640 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Heroic Games Launcher is an open-source game launcher that allows users to manage and play games from multiple digital storefronts including Epic Games Store, GOG, and Amazon Games. It supports Linux, Windows, and macOS, leveraging web technologies for its development.

╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍

𝗙𝗢𝗟𝗜𝗢 | Generating sophisticated PDF documents programmatically within Go applications, including converting HTML content to PDF, creating reports, invoices, and documents with advanced features like forms, signatures, and barcodes.  🔥 Super Hot!

✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐹 Go 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Generating sophisticated PDF documents programmatically within Go applications, including converting HTML content to PDF, creating reports, invoices, and documents with advanced features like forms, signatures, and barcodes.
📅 Created: Mar 2026 • Updated: Mar 2026

✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Layout engine for programmatic PDF creation
✅ Fast HTML to PDF conversion (no Chrome/Puppeteer needed)
✅ Support for 40+ HTML elements, CSS (including flexbox, grid), SVG
✅ Forms (AcroForms)
✅ Digital signatures
✅ Barcode generation (Code128, QR, EAN-13)
✅ PDF/A compliance
✅ WASM support
✅ Go 1.21+ compatibility


✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧

⭐⭐⭐ 495 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 15 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 7 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Folio is a modern PDF generation library for Go, offering a comprehensive suite of features including a layout engine, HTML to PDF conversion, form creation, digital signatures, barcode generation, and PDF/A compliance. It aims to provide a fast and efficient way to create complex PDF documents directly within Go applications without external dependencies like browsers.

✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧

• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/carlos7ags/folio

𝗣𝗟𝗔𝗡𝗡𝗜𝗡𝗚-𝗪𝗜𝗧𝗛-𝗙𝗜𝗟𝗘𝗦 | To provide a structured and persistent planning system for AI agents and developers using markdown files, mimicking the successful workflow of Manus.  🔥 Super Hot!

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐍 Python 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To provide a structured and persistent planning system for AI agents and developers using markdown files, mimicking the successful workflow of Manus.
📅 Created: Jan 2026 • Updated: Mar 2026

♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Claude Code skill for persistent markdown planning
✅ Manus-style workflow pattern
✅ Project and task management via markdown files
✅ Session recovery and version management
✅ Support for various IDE hooks and agent integrations


♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ 17.1K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀

🔍 4 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

This Python repository implements a Claude Code skill that enables persistent markdown planning, inspired by the Manus workflow pattern. It allows users to manage projects and tasks through structured markdown files, facilitating a more organized and efficient development process.

♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦

𝗠𝗔𝗣𝗧𝗢𝗣𝗢𝗦𝗧𝗘𝗥 | Creating personalized, aesthetically pleasing map posters of any city in the world using code.  🔥 Super Hot!

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐍 Python 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Creating personalized, aesthetically pleasing map posters of any city in the world using code.
📅 Created: Jan 2026 • Updated: Mar 2026

┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Generate city map posters
✅ Customizable themes and styles
✅ Uses OpenStreetMap data via osmnx
✅ Exportable map designs
✅ Multilingual support with custom fonts
✅ Command-line interface for easy usage
✅ Support for uv and pip installation


┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

MapToPoster is a Python script that generates minimalist map posters of cities. It leverages OpenStreetMap data and Matplotlib to create customizable visual designs based on various themes and user-defined parameters.
